title: Genesis's Ultimate RPG
description: This modpack combines magic, adventure and bosses creating the ultimate RPG experience. This modpack is a modpack for an SMP
body:
This modpack combines magic, progression, bosses and more from a plethora of mods

### BOSSES
- Frostmaw
- Umvuthi, The Sunbird
- Ferrous Wroughtnaut
- Tongbi, the Sculptor
- 
- Night Lich
- Obsidilith
- Void Blossom
- Nether Gauntlet
- 
- Enhanced Ender Dragon
- Enhanced Wither
### MAGIC
- Goety - The Dark Arts
- Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks
### UTILITIES
- Plentiful methods of traversal
- A large variety of foods
- Backpacks
### BUILDING
- Handcrafted
- Stoneworks
- Chipped
- Excessive Building
### AUTOMATION
- Create
### MISC
- Enhanced Nether
- Enhanced End
- Artifacts
- Waystones
- Lots of Structures

You need to use atleast 3gb of RAM or the modpack won't work
